title: Deep learning wrap + DSA Graphs finish
focus: Re-record CV + NLP breadth answers; identify shaky topics for re-study.

items.label: Number OF Connected Components IN AN Undirected Graph
interviewQuestions: Is this BFS, DFS, or Union-Find? Defend the choice over the other two.
Walk through complexity in terms of V and E. Where do those costs come from?
How would you handle disconnected components, self-loops, or duplicate edges?

items.label: Graph Valid Tree
interviewQuestions: Is this BFS, DFS, or Union-Find? Defend the choice over the other two.
Walk through complexity in terms of V and E. Where do those costs come from?
How would you handle disconnected components, self-loops, or duplicate edges?

items.label: Word Ladder
interviewQuestions: Why BFS over DFS for shortest path?
What's the trick with the wildcard pattern (e.g., 'h*t') to build neighbours efficiently?

items.label: Perceptron, MLP, forward pass
interviewQuestions: Walk me through forward pass through a 2-layer MLP for binary classification.
Why can't a single perceptron solve XOR — and how does adding a hidden layer fix it?

items.label: Activations: sigmoid, tanh, ReLU, GELU, SwiGLU
interviewQuestions: Compare ReLU, Leaky ReLU, GELU, and SwiGLU — when does each shine?
Why did ReLU largely replace sigmoid/tanh in deep networks?
What is the dying ReLU problem and how do you mitigate it?

items.label: Weight initialization (Xavier, He)
interviewQuestions: Why does poor initialization cause vanishing or exploding gradients?
Compare Xavier vs He initialization — which goes with which activation and why?

items.label: Vision Transformer (ViT)
interviewQuestions: How does ViT tokenize an image, and what's the role of the [CLS] token?
When does a ViT beat a CNN, and when does data-hungriness hurt it?

items.label: CLIP: contrastive image-text pretraining
interviewQuestions: How does CLIP enable zero-shot image classification?
Walk me through CLIP's contrastive training objective.

items.label: BLIP, LLaVA, multimodal LLMs
interviewQuestions: How do multimodal LLMs like LLaVA fuse vision encoders with language models?
Compare early fusion vs late fusion in vision-language models — what does each cost in compute and quality?

items.label: Self-attention(Q, K, V) end-to-end
interviewQuestions: Walk me through self-attention(Q, K, V) end-to-end.
Why divide by √d_k inside softmax?
What does multi-head attention buy you over a single head?

items.label: Encoder-decoder, positional encoding, residuals
interviewQuestions: Walk me through the transformer block: attention → add+norm → FFN → add+norm.
Compare absolute vs relative vs RoPE positional encodings.

items.label: Sparse, linear, FlashAttention, MQA, GQA
interviewQuestions: What problem does FlashAttention solve, and how?
Compare MHA, MQA, and GQA — KV-cache trade-offs.

items.label: Code self-attention, multi-head attention, and a tiny transformer
interviewQuestions: Implement scaled dot-product self-attention and track the shapes of Q, K, V, scores, and output.
How do masks change self-attention for causal language modeling?
What changes when you split attention into multiple heads and then concatenate them?
